Now I want to tell you that multithreading and multiprocessing are a little different in themselves.  Now there is a little difference in the process and thread.  If you have multiple CPUs, then you can use them by using processes.

chunks.text: If you are using threading, then it is easy to spawn threads, it is easy, it happens in less time.  Now threading vs processing is a very big topic of the operating system.  But you can understand that threads are lightweight, threads are inside a process.  But the processes are a big job parallel to the CPUs.  If you want to execute a heavy task, then you use the process.
